master_reference_landscape.Camera POV: Slightly elevated rocky outcrop, ~30m above ground level
master_reference_landscape.Mid-ground: Open plain extending toward horizon, gentle river meandering left to right
master_reference_landscape.Background: Distant mountain range with 3 prominent peaks (1 taller central + 2 smaller flanking)
master_reference_landscape.Sky: Upper two-thirds of frame (varies by era)
master_reference_landscape.Style baseline: BBC Nat Geo documentary realism, 8K hyperdetailed, cinematic 24mm lens
master_reference_landscape.Total scenes: 42 (logarithmic time scale: more detail in human era)

note: Scenes 1-2 use a variant without the river (Hadean era - no liquid water yet). Scenes 3-5 use ocean variant (river replaced by ocean during early Earth/oxidation events). All other scenes use the master reference exactly as defined above.
